site.description: Bespoke wooden furniture and custom cabinetry, crafted with passion and precision by an Amsterdam artisan. Working in Amsterdam, Utrecht, and the surrounding areas.

contact.title: Project Estimate
contact.subtitle: Fill in your details below to give me an idea of your project. I work in the Amsterdam and Utrecht region. The calculator provides a rough estimate, after which I will contact you to discuss the details.

form.name: Full Name
form.placeholder: Tell me about your vision, the dimensions, and where the project will be realized...
form.success: Thank you! Your request has been sent successfully. I will be in touch soon.
form.error: Oops! Something went wrong. Please try again later or contact me directly via email.

estimator.title: Project Estimator
estimator.subtitle: Select your options below to get a rough baseline estimate.
estimator.disclaimer: *This is a rough baseline estimate for materials and labor. A final quote requires a detailed consultation.

hero.description: Bespoke wooden furniture and custom cabinetry, handcrafted by an Amsterdam artisan. I work on projects in the Amsterdam, Utrecht, and surrounding regions.

portfolio.title: My Portfolio
portfolio.subtitle: An overview of my custom-made furniture, cabinetry, and other woodwork.
